lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in poor condition. It has significant mechanical issues and extensive wear and damage to both the interior and exterior. Major repairs are required for it to be fully functional.
Mint condition.

The vehicle is in poor condition. The engine and transmission require significant repairs. The exterior has multiple dents and visible rust. The interior shows heavy wear, including tears in the upholstery and staining.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable daily driver, though it clearly shows its age. The exterior paint has lost some of its original luster, with several noticeable scratches and minor dings scattered across the body panels. Inside, the cabin shows significant wear and tear, particularly on the driver's seat upholstery and the floor mats. While the car starts and runs reliably, a potential buyer should expect to invest in some upcoming maintenance, such as new tires and a brake service, to keep it in good working order.

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, appearing and driving as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior paint is flawless, retaining its original deep luster without a single scratch, dent, or stone chip. Inside, the interior is pristine; the upholstery shows zero signs of wear, and every feature and electronic component functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is perfect, having been meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled environment. It comes with a complete service history and requires nothing but a new owner who appreciates a vehicle in showroom state. This is a rare find for anyone seeking a like-new experience.

Calling all DIY fans and project seekers! This vehicle is a fantastic opportunity for anyone looking for a budget-friendly fixer-upper. While it's in poor condition and definitely needs some dedicated mechanical and cosmetic attention to get back on the road safely, it serves as a wonderful blank canvas at a price that can't be beat!

We are pleased to present this distinguished vehicle, which exemplifies a harmonious balance of performance and reliability. Meticulously maintained and subject to a rigorous mechanical evaluation, this unit offers a refined driving experience and a well-preserved interior. It stands as a testament to conscientious ownership, providing the discerning buyer with a high-caliber automotive solution that commands confidence on the road.

Hey there! I’m super excited to find a new home for this reliable ride. It’s been well-loved and is still in great shape, running smoothly and ready for all your upcoming adventures! It’s got plenty of life left in it and has been a total joy to drive. If you're looking for something dependable that looks awesome on the road, this is the one for you! Feel free to reach out with any questions—I'd love to chat!

Offering a mechanically sound E92 M3 featuring the high-revving S65 4.0L V8 with an 8,400 RPM redline. This example boasts a lightning-fast M-DCT dual-clutch transmission and a variable M differential lock for optimal power delivery. The chassis maintains its composure with Electronic Damper Control (EDC) and precise suspension geometry. Critical preventative maintenance has been addressed, including rod bearing replacement and updated throttle actuators. While exhibiting minor aesthetic wear typical of a well-loved driver’s car, the drivetrain and longitudinal dynamics remain sharp. A robust performance platform with a rigorous service history and no structural compromises.
Clean title. Runs well. Minor cosmetic wear. Regular maintenance performed.

Presenting a dependable and well-cared-for vehicle that strikes an excellent balance between performance and utility. The exterior finish remains vibrant, showing only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with responsible daily use. Inside, you’ll find a spacious, tidy interior with well-preserved seating and a fully functional dashboard suite. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly, benefiting from a documented history of routine servicing and recent maintenance. The tires have ample tread remaining, and the brakes provide firm, responsive stopping power. This car has been smoke-free and garage-kept, ensuring it remains a solid, high-quality choice for its next owner.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, which exemplifies consistent mechanical integrity and professional care. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, this asset offers a superior balance of performance and enduring value. It stands as a testament to responsible ownership, presenting an exceptional opportunity for the discerning buyer who prioritizes reliability and a refined driving experience.

Presenting a distinguished vehicle that exemplifies a superior standard of maintenance and care. This automobile offers a refined driving experience, characterized by its robust mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic. Thoroughly inspected to ensure long-term reliability, it stands as a testament to balanced performance and sophisticated design. An ideal selection for the professional seeking a dependable yet prestigious addition to their collection.

Hey there! Looking for a reliable ride that still looks and feels great on the road? This car has been my trusty companion and is in wonderful shape for its next owner. It’s been well-maintained, drives like a dream, and is ready to hit the highway today! Come take it for a spin—you’re going to love it!

Available is a mechanically sound E46 M3 featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six power plant with individual throttle bodies and a 7,900 RPM redline. This example utilizes a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission paired with a variable M differential lock for optimal torque distribution. The chassis has undergone critical subframe reinforcement and features an upgraded suspension geometry with Bilstein dampers. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive VANOS system overhaul and valve clearance adjustment to ensure peak volumetric efficiency. While the body shows minor road-going patina, the drivetrain remains robust and communicative, offering a pure analog driving experience.
Used car in good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Minor cosmetic wear. Runs well.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a fantastic blend of reliability and classic appeal. The exterior boasts a vibrant finish that catches the light beautifully, with only minor road wear consistent with responsible ownership. Inside, the cabin remains exceptionally clean and comfortable, featuring well-preserved upholstery and fully functional instrumentation. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and has been kept up to date with a consistent service schedule, ensuring a confident driving experience. Whether you're looking for a dependable daily driver or a stylish weekend companion, this car delivers a solid, well-rounded performance that reflects its history of careful stewardship.

This meticulously maintained vehicle exemplifies mechanical integrity and refined aesthetic appeal. Engineered for sustained performance, it offers a confident driving experience characterized by responsive handling and a well-preserved cabin. Each component has been thoroughly vetted to ensure operational excellence, providing a sophisticated option for the discerning motorist who prioritizes both reliability and prestige.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering a superior balance of performance and long-term dependability. This unit has undergone a comprehensive inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Featuring a refined interior and a robust powertrain, it represents an exceptional opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a high-caliber driving experience at a competitive market valuation.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty car, and she’s been an absolute joy to drive. It’s been well-loved and runs like a charm, perfect for anyone looking for a reliable daily driver that still looks great on the road. There’s some very light wear here and there, but honestly, it’s in solid shape and ready for its next adventure. I've taken good care of it, so you can just hop in and go. Feel free to reach out if you want to take it for a spin!

This E46 M3 is a purist’s specification, featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six engine with individual throttle bodies and a 7,900 RPM redline. Power is sent to the rear wheels via a Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox and a factory M-Variable limited-slip differential. The chassis is well-sorted, featuring reinforced subframe mounting points and a recently serviced VANOS system to ensure optimal valve timing. While showing minor cosmetic patina consistent with a well-loved driver's car, the mechanical components are robust, offering sharp throttle response and the iconic metallic rasp of the factory exhaust. A mechanically sound example of BMW's ultimate driving machine.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Reliable performance. Clean title. Minor wear consistent with age.

This vehicle is a prime example of a well-maintained daily driver that balances performance with reliability. Mechanically, it is in excellent shape, having received regular oil changes and scheduled maintenance; the engine pulls strong and the transmission shifts smoothly through every gear. The exterior retains a beautiful luster, though a close inspection reveals the minor stone chips and light surface marks typical of a car that has been enjoyed on the open road. Inside, the cabin is impressively clean and smoke-free, with the leather upholstery showing only minimal softening and all electronic features—including the premium sound system and climate control—functioning perfectly. It offers a tight, responsive driving experience with no underlying mechanical concerns, making it a dependable and sharp-looking choice for its next owner.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver who values mechanical integrity and sustained performance. Having undergone a comprehensive professional inspection, the car exhibits a well-preserved interior and a robust drivetrain, ensuring a reliable and sophisticated driving experience. This model stands as a testament to disciplined ownership, offering a refined balance of luxury and long-term value for its next proprietor.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has been curated to meet rigorous standards, offering a refined driving experience and a well-preserved interior. An excellent acquisition for those seeking a balance of luxury and proven reliability.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for me. It’s got that perfect balance of being well-loved but still looking and feeling great on the road. Perfect for someone who wants a dependable car that's ready for its next adventure. Come take it for a spin!

This E46-generation M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54B32 inline-six, renowned for its individual throttle bodies and 8,000 RPM redline. The dual-VANOS system has been professionally serviced, ensuring precise variable valve timing and a broad torque curve. Power is managed via a tactile 6-speed manual gearbox and sent to the rear wheels through a limited-slip differential. The chassis remains composed thanks to a reinforced rear subframe and refreshed bushings, while the suspension geometry provides the telepathic feedback expected of this platform. Solid vehicle. Clean interior. Regular maintenance. Minor surface scratches. Mechanically sound.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers the perfect blend of performance and reliability. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only the minor character marks expected from careful road use. Inside, you'll find a pristine, smoke-free cabin featuring premium upholstery that has been conditioned regularly to prevent wear. All electronic components, from the intuitive infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control, function exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car is sound; it has followed a strict preventative maintenance schedule with recent fluid flushes and a fresh set of high-performance tires. The engine purrs with consistent power, and the transmission shifts seamlessly through every gear. Whether you are commuting through the city or embarking on a long-distance road trip, this car provides a smooth, confident, and quiet ride. It comes with a complete set of service records and two original keys, representing an exceptional

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, which exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic discipline. Demonstrating a consistent history of professional care, this automobile remains in commendable condition, offering both reliability and a refined road presence. It has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for safety and performance. This represents a distinguished acquisition for the discerning driver seeking an uncompromising balance of value and quality.
